evidence.agent_intuitiveness: New-process selection succeeds without user PID input.
evidence.agent_ease_of_use: Selection reason is returned in proof signals.
evidence.output_parseability: windowSelectionReason and exactTitleCandidateCount are structured JSON.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: Ambiguous baseline windows are refused instead of guessed.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: Priority order is fixed and PID sorting remains stable.
evidence.self_documentation: README, oracle docs, capability fields updated.
evidence.regression_resistance: Two pure selection regressions in src/desktop.rs.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: Normal Power BI child UI ownership no longer needs the unsafe override.
evidence.agent_ease_of_use: Capability safety text documents descendant ownership.
evidence.error_pedagogy: Unrelated foreground processes still fail closed.
evidence.intent_inference: Recognizes Power BI's child-process UI topology.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: Only a verified parent chain to the selected Desktop PID is accepted.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: Bounded parent traversal with cycle guard.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: --for now behaves as a focused query.
evidence.agent_ergonomics: validate discovery fell from a full catalog payload to 11040 bytes.
evidence.agent_ease_of_use: scope, omittedCatalogs, and fullContractCommand explain the response.
evidence.output_parseability: Large fields are explicit nulls rather than disappearing.
evidence.intent_inference: Filter intent now controls payload scope.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: Stable field set and command order.
evidence.composability: Smaller stdout is easier to pipe into agents.
evidence.regression_resistance: CLI contract test enforces a 20KB ceiling.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: dax lint points to model dax lint.
evidence.agent_ergonomics: One failed call returns one exact discovery command.
evidence.error_pedagogy: Wrong path is named and corrected.
evidence.intent_inference: Unique suffix and token-reordering inference cover observed errors.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: Correction does not auto-execute or mutate.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: Only unique catalog matches are suggested.
evidence.regression_resistance: CLI contract test pins both corrections.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: Exact QA command paths are shown together.
evidence.agent_ergonomics: One repair checklist replaces command guessing.
evidence.agent_ease_of_use: Hierarchy drill, multi-series comparison, and drillthrough are separated.
evidence.error_pedagogy: Unsafe raw visual deletion is explicitly prohibited.
evidence.intent_inference: Maps user intent to the right Power BI interaction primitive.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: Visual deletion requires CLI dry-run/output/confirmation flow.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: Fixed QA ordering and handle reuse.
evidence.composability: Commands are paste-ready on PowerShell/Bash wrappers.
evidence.regression_resistance: quick_validate.py passes and reference checklist is committed.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: Cancellation now completes inside the advertised deadline.
evidence.agent_ergonomics: Observed targeted runtime fell from about 13.5 seconds to 1.5 seconds.
evidence.intent_inference: Refresh work now matches the PID-tree task.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: PID reuse protection still uses parent and process start time; tests assert the recorded descendant identity is gone.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: Same bounded cleanup state machine and identity checks.
evidence.regression_resistance: Existing timeout and graceful-descendant tests enforce timing and actual process reaping without requiring a racy diagnostic counter.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: One open and one idempotent close command express the lifecycle.
evidence.agent_ergonomics: Opening a new managed session closes the prior owned session first.
evidence.agent_ease_of_use: The open response returns the cleanup command and receipt path.
evidence.output_parseability: Stable open/close schemas expose session and cleanup state.
evidence.error_pedagogy: Stale locks and invalid receipts identify explicit recovery.
evidence.intent_inference: Interactive inspection is distinct from one-shot evidence.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: Only one exact recorded session can be closed.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: One receipt and one create-new lock serialize lifecycle changes.
evidence.self_documentation: Capabilities, README, oracle docs, and skill agree.
evidence.composability: The pair fits a finally/cleanup step.
evidence.regression_resistance: Idempotent, stale, invalid, lock, and live smoke coverage.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: Cleanup needs no user PID selection.
evidence.agent_ergonomics: Exact identity is captured at launch/observation time.
evidence.agent_ease_of_use: Unresolved cleanup is surfaced in the same response.
evidence.output_parseability: attempted, identityMatched, closed, targeted, and remaining are stable.
evidence.error_pedagogy: Ownership refusal is never mislabeled as success.
evidence.intent_inference: Post-baseline provenance identifies the launched instance.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: PID, creation time, baseline, and PBIDesktop identity guard every root.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: No title or executable sweep fallback exists.
evidence.self_documentation: The exact guard contract is documented.
evidence.composability: Failure is a nonzero oracle result.
evidence.regression_resistance: Pure cleanup-state and rendered PowerShell guard tests plus fresh-eyes review.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: --mode between directly expresses a range slider.
evidence.agent_ergonomics: The same mode works in direct and declarative authoring.
evidence.agent_ease_of_use: Numeric/date requirements are stated in catalog examples.
evidence.output_parseability: Capabilities advertise the exact Basic, Dropdown, Between vocabulary.
evidence.error_pedagogy: Text fields return unsupported_feature with a concrete repair.
evidence.intent_inference: Year/date range intent maps to Between.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: Dry-run remains available and invalid bindings do not write.
evidence.self_documentation: README, feature catalog, docs, and skill describe the boundary.
evidence.composability: Spec validation and set-bindings preserve one invariant.
evidence.regression_resistance: Add, spec, build, and rebind success/refusal tests.

evidence.agent_intuitiveness: One canonical artifact is the obvious edit target.
evidence.agent_ease_of_use: The bounded Desktop loop is copyable.
evidence.error_pedagogy: Raw launches and leave-open are explicitly replaced.
evidence.intent_inference: Interactive and one-shot testing are separated.
evidence.safety_with_recovery: Finally-style close and Git rollback are explicit.
evidence.determinism_and_reproducibility: Diffs, receipts, and handoff checks reference one path.
evidence.self_documentation: The skill is the maintained operating playbook.
evidence.composability: The loop composes with Bridge and DAX checks.
evidence.regression_resistance: Skill quick validation and audit regression note.
